detail.description: Connor Wong singles on a sharp ground ball to left fielder Taylor Ward.
Connor Wong singles on a soft ground ball to third baseman Curtis Mead.
Connor Wong singles on a pop up to second baseman Jorbit Vivas.
Connor Wong singles on a line drive to right fielder Nathan Lukes.
Connor Wong singles on a line drive to left fielder Davis Schneider. Marcelo Mayer to 2nd.
Connor Wong singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Taylor Ward.
Connor Wong singles on a ground ball to left fielder Chandler Simpson, deflected by third baseman Junior Caminero.
Connor Wong singles on a line drive to left fielder Dustin Harris.
Connor Wong hits a ground-rule double (4) on a line drive to right-center field.
Connor Wong singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Cole Carrigg.
Connor Wong homers (1) on a fly ball to left field. Anthony Seigler scores.
Connor Wong singles on a ground ball to right fielder Tyler Freeman.
Connor Wong singles on a ground ball to right fielder Cam Smith. Isiah Kiner-Falefa to 3rd.
Connor Wong doubles (3) on a line drive to left fielder Brice Matthews. Isiah Kiner-Falefa to 3rd.
Connor Wong doubles (2) on a line drive to center fielder Jake Meyers. Marcelo Mayer scores.
Connor Wong doubles (8) on a ground ball to left fielder David Fry. Marcelo Mayer to 3rd.

Connor Wong singles on a line drive to left fielder Stuart Fairchild. Willson Contreras scores. Marcelo Mayer scores. Masataka Yoshida to 3rd. Connor Wong to 2nd. Throwing error by left fielder Stuart Fairchild.
Umpire reviewed (home run), call on the field was overturned: Connor Wong doubles (7) on a sharp fly ball to left fielder Stuart Fairchild. Marcelo Mayer scores.
Connor Wong doubles (1) on a fly ball to center fielder Dane Myers.
Connor Wong singles on a fly ball to right fielder Noelvi Marte. Masataka Yoshida to 2nd.
White Sox challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: Connor Wong singles on a ground ball to first baseman Miguel Vargas. Brett Harris to 2nd.
Connor Wong singles on a bunt ground ball to third baseman Colson Montgomery.
Connor Wong singles on a line drive to right fielder Jo Adell. Andruw Monasterio to 2nd.
Connor Wong singles on a line drive to center fielder Victor Scott II.
Connor Wong singles on a line drive to left fielder Tyrone Taylor.
Tigers challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Connor Wong singles on a line drive to center fielder Matt Vierling. Andruw Monasterio scores. Caleb Durbin to 3rd.
Connor Wong doubles (6) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Isaac Collins.
Connor Wong doubles (5) on a fly ball to right fielder Tyler O'Neill. Trevor Story scores. Andruw Monasterio scores. Caleb Durbin scores.
Connor Wong singles on a soft ground ball to third baseman Ryan Kreidler.
Connor Wong singles on a line drive to right fielder Mike Yastrzemski.
Connor Wong singles on a line drive to left fielder Cody Bellinger.
